name: Monster Mansion
description:
Brave explorers beware... for in these haunted halls ye shall taste true despair...

Hal's Haunted Halls is a place thought to only exist in myths and legends, but in the deepest caves of this mystical world lies a portal that takes any adventurer brave enough to come face to face with the horrors of the unknown...

The Haunted Halls are structured like a massive mansion. Each twist and turn contains a different assortment of fantastical monsters and terrors unseen of in the real world.
